Title: Tsui ni henshin!! Densetsu no Sûpâ Saiya-jin: Son Gokû
Actors: Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong, John Burgmeier
Plot: Goku, Krillin, Piccolo, and Gohan celebrate the defeat of Frieza, but they may be celebrating too soon. Meanwhile, Yamcha, Tien, and Chiaotzu continue fighting the Ginyu Force.
